[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 111100111 7
6 001000001 2
7 010011000 3

01 10 001000001 2 match 6
12 21 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
23 32 000001000 1
34 43 000001100 2
45 54 010000100 2
56 65 110000100 3
67 76 110001010 4
70 07 110100011 5

02 20 010000000 1
13 31 000000001 1
24 42 010011000 3 match 7
35 53 000100100 2
46 64 010001100 3
57 75 110100000 3
60 06 111000110 5
71 17 000000001 1

14 41 000000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4

36 63 000001110 3
47 74 010011000 3 match 7

61 16 001000000 1
72 27 010011000 3 match 7

26 62 010001000 2
37 73 000101011 4
